dialogues.text: General Luna! A telegram, ordered by the President. It summons you to Cabanatuan to meet with Aguinaldo and discuss urgent military matters.
Cabanatuan? And urgent military matters? Hmm. The timing is suspicious, and the location odd. What do you think, Aide? Why there, why now?
Sir, given the current tension with other officers, I would urge caution.
Though suspicious, I understand the importance of unity. I will go. If we are to win this war, we must present a united front. Prepare a small escort only. Leave the rest of the troops here.
